challenge.title: Korak 2
challenge.description:
Možete dobiti oglašene usluge unutar ugrađenog modula putem notacije tačke. Notacija tačke funkcioniše dodavanjem tačke praćene imenom usluge na ime modula. Na primer, ovako dobijate konstantu za ascii_lowercase:

import string


print(string.ascii_lowercase)
# Output: abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz

U ovom projektu, koristićeš drugačiju konstantu iz modula string.

Objavi novi parametar nazvan letters i postavi vrednost string.ascii_letters za ovaj parametar.

tests.text: Trebalo bi da objavite parametar koji se zove letters.
Trebalo bi da postavite vrednost string.ascii_letters za vaš parametar letters.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
    import string
    letters == string.ascii_letters
  `))
})

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length=16, nums=1, special_chars=1, uppercase=1, lowercase=1):

    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        
        constraints = [
            (nums, r'\d'),
            (special_chars, fr'[{symbols}]'),
            (uppercase, r'[A-Z]'),
            (lowercase, r'[a-z]')
        ]

        # Check constraints
        if all(
            constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password))
            for constraint, pattern in constraints
        ):            
            break
    
    return password
    

if __name__ == '__main__':
    new_password = generate_password()
    print('Generated password:', new_password)
